note: Targeted L2 driven by the 2026-07-16 L1 handoff. Only findings with live/empirical evidence or new L2-only discoveries; L1 findings not re-listed unless their verdict changed.

findings.title: CONFIRMED: Tool Runner renders literal "[object Object]" on raw-AppError failures
findings.got: DOM element pre.typo-code with text exactly "[object Object]", visible, after running airtable_create_record on Intel Analyst Prime.
evidence: live DOM query 2026-07-16: {tag:'pre', text:'[object Object]', className:'typo-code font-mono ...', visible:true}
bridge invoke_tool_direct notion_query_database -> raw AppError JSON rejection

findings.title: NEW: builtin:// tools are unrunnable in the Tool Runner and mislabeled 'misconfigured'
findings.expected: A template persona's gmail_read/file_read tools can be hand-tested like any other tool (or are honestly labeled 'not manually testable').
findings.got: invoke_tool_direct builtin-gmail-read returned typed failure error_kind='misconfigured': "script_path must be a script file (ts, tsx, ...) — got: builtin://gmail_read". The real execution engine runs builtins fine; the tester falsely reports them broken.
evidence: bridge result 2026-07-16 on persona 2ddb64ae (T: Email Morning Digest)
findings.scope_note: L1 surface-model gap: the tool taxonomy has a fourth kind (builtin) the L1 model missed.

findings.title: NEW: 'Evaluate due' swallows per-KPI evaluation errors — accepted KPI can never measure and the user is never told why
findings.expected: Clicking Evaluate due either measures the KPI or explains why it can't.
findings.got: Accepted 'Execution Failure Rate' (derived), clicked Evaluate due: no measurement, no message, two EMPTY toasts. Direct invocation revealed the discarded error: 'Derived KPIs need the project linked to a team'. KPIsPage.handleEvaluateDue ignores the results map (void n).
findings.scope_note: Upstream design gap: acceptance flow never surfaces the project-team-linkage precondition for derived KPIs.

findings.title: CONFIRMED: goal editor has no KPI-link affordance (Title/Description/Status only)
evidence: live dialog field enumeration 2026-07-16: label Title + input goal-title, label Description + textarea goal-description, label Status + select

findings.title: STRENGTH: CLI-engine execution path passes live end-to-end (terminal status, served model id, grounded output quality)
evidence: execution 8747f46e: completed, 55s, claude-sonnet-4-6, output addresses supplied Tauri-2 topic with 3 sourced items
execution f0bc99ee: completed, 179s (ungrounded fallback due to harness field-name; still terminal)

findings.title: STRENGTH: companion grounding is exceptional; Spanish works end-to-end in direct chat (partially refutes F-MAJOR-9 practical severity)
evidence: captured turn ep_cf3a0bb3: full-Spanish reply + quick-replies; names 5 real failed executions w/ dates + correct cause (app restart); 24h stats match DB; 2 real healing incidents surfaced
findings.scope_note: Structural locale gap stands (no directive; post-tool-result English risk; 'Michal' hardcode visible in recall titles).

findings.title: STRENGTH: vault trust surfaces render live (badge, AES copy, Unverifiable/Failing taxonomy with text labels)
evidence: vault-trust-badge: 'Vault is secure' -> expanded 'AES-256-GCM encryption' + 'Credentials never leave this device'
7 Unverifiable + 2 Failing badges visible with explicit text
findings.scope_note: 0 Verified credentials in fixture profile — the green path remains live-unexercised.

findings.title: Testability: Tool Runner has zero data-testids; companion orb unopenable via click()/synthetic events (bridge openCompanion is the only deterministic path)
evidence: orb pointer-event-only handler AthenaOrb.tsx:215-230; synthetic PointerEvent + keydown dispatch both failed; bridge.openCompanion worked
